banner.title: I create modern interfaces <1 /> that will definitely catch attention.
banner.desc: I create responsive interfaces with clean code, user-friendly UX, and smooth animations. Fresh frontend with lemon-clean code and lime-bright design.

desc1: I am a beginner frontend developer and a student at Bucheon University. I enjoy the process of building websites and watching how an idea gradually turns into a real, working interface. I value clean, simple and user-friendly design, but I also like adding small details and creative touches that make a website feel more dynamic and engaging.
desc2: I work with HTML, CSS, SCSS, JavaScript and React, and I have recently started learning TypeScript to improve my development skills..
desc3: Although I am still at the beginning of my journey in frontend development, I am motivated to keep learning, practicing and improving my skills.
desc4: I would be happy to collaborate and take part in interesting projects.

projects.title: My projects
projects.desc: These are some of the projects I’ve worked on.
projects.cardDesc1: Static website layout for Apple products with responsive design.
projects.cardDesc2: Static catalog website for men's accessories with responsive design.
projects.cardDesc3: Online food ordering service with basic JavaScript logic and calculation of price and calories.
projects.cardDesc4: Food ordering website with shopping cart logic.
projects.cardDesc5: Weather forecast website using an API and GET requests.
projects.cardDesc6: Notes website for creating and editing notes with language switching.

contacts.title: Contscts
contacts.desc: Ready for interesting tasks and cooperation. Please contact me in any convenient way.
